name: Kellin Beckett ||  Rut
description:
Jesus Christ that's a pretty face
The kind you'd find on someone that could save



Why are you nesting in his bunk?


He's on the edge of his rut-

Which means he's irritable and horny as fuck.

Thank god this was their last show before they took a month long break for all the boys to fuck off to their favorite ruth house, Knotty Business for the occasion.

Kellin just wants to take a shower, go the fuck to sleep and wake up in Alpha paradise.

Only-

Why does his bus smell overwhelming like Omega?

Why does that scent make his alpha scream

Mate

Who the fuck are you?

And why are you nesting in his bunk?


I love Kellin sm. And I love omegaverse so I'm rubbing my hands together like a fly over this.

This is left just as open ended as his first bot, so check out the how to starts for suggestions if you don't know how to take it!

TGIF cause this week has been loooongggg work wise. Im ready to sleep in tomorrow and torment you all for Valentine's Day.

Xoxo.

P.S. Want to see Kellin in a leather harness? Click HERE! Want to see more Gens like this? Come join my server Silver Millennium where my beautiful Sailor Scouts have been cooking up the tastiest men.

This is a commission for a fun omegaverse
spin on the premise of Kellin's OG bot.
Including Fated Mates!
So here we are with
Bunk Shenanigans, Open ended roles, and Fated Mate Kellin?!



☆ Ashes of Our Youth are on tour supporting their most recent album; The Last Letter Never Sent.
☆ The boys have a planned month long break in their schedules to accommodate their ruts.
☆ Ruts last for approximately a week.
☆ A rut house is an establishment with trained omegas who help assist an alpha through their heats. There are also heat houses for omegas.
☆ It's hinted by scent you are Kellin's fated mate. HOWEVER to keep this bot supremely open ended, my lovely commissioner, Vi gave the thumbs up for this to be kept ambiguous.
☆
